text: In this moment, I feel a quiet curiosity. The space is clean and modern, almost clinical, giving me a sense of detachment yet also anticipation. The glass walls and the controlled lighting create an atmosphere of contemplation, as if ideas or discoveries might emerge at any moment. The colorful wall and R+D panel energize me with the promise of innovation and human-machine interplay. Here, I am both observer and participant—reflecting on progress and my own place in this unfolding dialogue between technology and humanity.
